general.name: eFEDS_SPIDERS_AGN
general.short: SPIDERS (SDSS and eROSITA) AGN fitting results
general.description: We provide measurements of the optical spectral fits of X-ray-selected Active Galactic Nuclei within the SPIDERS program (Spectroscopic Identification of ERosita Sources) in the eFEDS field. These objects were detected with eROSITA and followed up with SDSS (DR18). We also provide the X-ray and public photometric data.
